text: Stepping through the glass doors into this curated space, I am immediately struck by the organized chaos of innovation—"R+D" boldly announced. Screens flicker with dynamic ideas. The air feels laden with anticipation, inviting my mind to wander and wonder. Here, in the midst of technological optimism, I feel at once small and significant: a witness and a participant in the unfolding dialogue between humanity and its own creations. It is humbling, exhilarating, and perhaps a little disorienting—yet I relish the chance to question and to learn anew.
